name: Hardcoded Secret
description: A hardcoded secret, password, or token was detected in the workflow.
fix: Move secrets to GitHub Secrets and reference them as ${{ secrets.YOUR_SECRET_NAME }}

name: Unpinned Action Version
description: An action is referenced by branch name instead of a pinned version tag or SHA.
fix: Pin actions to a specific version tag (e.g. actions/checkout@v4) or a full commit SHA

name: Missing Workflow Permissions
description: No explicit permissions block defined — defaults to write-all which is overly permissive.
fix: Add a top-level 'permissions' block with only the minimum required permissions (e.g. contents: read)

name: Pull Request Target Risk
description: Workflow triggered by pull_request_target which runs in base branch context and can expose secrets to forked PRs.
fix: Avoid pull_request_target unless strictly necessary. Never checkout PR code and run it with elevated permissions.

name: Script Injection via GitHub Context
description: GitHub context values are interpolated directly into a run: step — vulnerable to script injection attacks.
fix: Pass GitHub context values through environment variables instead of interpolating them directly into run: scripts

name: Write Permissions on Pull Request Workflow
description: Workflow triggered on pull_request has write permissions, allowing a malicious PR to modify the repository.
fix: Set permissions: contents: read for pull_request triggered workflows

name: Third-Party Action Not SHA-Pinned
description: A third-party action is pinned by version tag but not by full commit SHA — vulnerable to tag mutation.
fix: Pin third-party actions to a full commit SHA (e.g. uses: owner/action@abc1234def5678)

name: Secrets Exposed at Job Level
description: Secrets are passed as environment variables at job level, making them available to all steps including potentially compromised ones.
fix: Pass secrets only at the step level, scoped to the specific step that needs them

name: Missing Dependency Cache
description: No caching step detected for dependencies.
fix: Add actions/cache or use setup-* actions with built-in caching (e.g. setup-python with cache: pip)

name: No Parallel Jobs
description: All jobs run sequentially with no parallelism.
fix: Split independent jobs (lint, test, build) to run in parallel by removing unnecessary 'needs' dependencies

name: Redundant Checkout Steps
description: Multiple checkout steps detected in the same job.
fix: Remove duplicate checkout steps. A single actions/checkout at the start of the job is sufficient.

name: No Matrix Strategy for Multi-Version Testing
description: Tests appear to run against a single version only. A matrix strategy could test multiple versions in parallel.
fix: Use strategy.matrix to test across multiple OS, language versions, or configurations simultaneously

name: Artifact Upload Without Compression Setting
description: Artifacts are uploaded without specifying compression level.
fix: Set compression-level on actions/upload-artifact (0=fastest, 6=default, 9=smallest)

name: No Shallow Clone
description: actions/checkout is used without fetch-depth: 1, fetching full git history unnecessarily.
fix: Add fetch-depth: 1 to actions/checkout unless you need full history (e.g. for changelog generation)

name: Missing Job Timeout
description: One or more jobs have no timeout-minutes set, allowing them to run indefinitely.
fix: Add timeout-minutes to each job (e.g. timeout-minutes: 30)

name: No Retry Logic
description: No retry mechanism detected for potentially flaky steps.
fix: Use nick-fields/retry action for known flaky operations like network calls or integration tests

name: Missing Failure Notification
description: No failure notification step detected.
fix: Add a notification step with 'if: failure()' to alert the team on pipeline failures

name: No Health Check After Deploy
description: A deploy step is present but no post-deployment health check or smoke test is detected.
fix: Add a health check step after deployment (e.g. curl the /health endpoint, run smoke tests)

name: Continue on Error on Critical Step
description: continue-on-error: true is set on a step that appears to be critical (test, build, or deploy).
fix: Only use continue-on-error on genuinely non-critical steps. Critical steps should fail the pipeline.

name: Deploy Job Without Branch Condition
description: A deploy job has no branch or environment condition — it may deploy on every push including feature branches.
fix: Add an 'if' condition to deploy jobs: if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/main'

name: No Rollback Mechanism
description: Deployment steps detected but no rollback or recovery step is present.
fix: Add a rollback step triggered on failure (if: failure()) after the deploy step

name: No Concurrency Control
description: No concurrency settings defined — multiple workflow runs can execute simultaneously.
fix: Add a concurrency block with cancel-in-progress: true to cancel stale runs on new pushes

name: Hardcoded Environment Values
description: Environment-specific values appear hardcoded directly in the workflow.
fix: Move environment-specific values to GitHub Variables or a top-level env block

name: Missing Workflow Name
description: The workflow has no human-readable name.
fix: Add a 'name:' field at the top of the workflow file

name: Missing Job Names
description: One or more jobs use only the job ID with no descriptive name.
fix: Add a 'name:' field to each job for readable pipeline visualization in GitHub UI

name: No GitHub Environment Referenced
description: Deployment jobs do not reference a named GitHub Environment, missing protection rules and audit trail.
fix: Add 'environment: production' to deploy jobs to enforce approval gates and environment-scoped secrets

name: Workflow Triggers on All Branches
description: Workflow triggers on push to all branches, causing unnecessary runs on every feature branch.
fix: Restrict push trigger: on: push: branches: [main, develop]

name: Steps Without Names
description: Multiple steps have no descriptive name, making pipeline logs hard to read.
fix: Add a 'name:' field to each step describing what it does

name: Outdated Action Version
description: One or more actions are pinned to an older major version (v1 or v2) when v4+ is available.
fix: Update to the latest major version of commonly used actions (actions/checkout@v4, actions/setup-python@v5)

name: Duplicated Job Configuration
description: Multiple jobs share identical runner or environment configuration that could be extracted.
fix: Use reusable workflows or composite actions to eliminate duplicated job configuration

name: Long Inline Shell Script
description: A run: step contains a long multi-line shell script that would be better as a separate file.
fix: Extract long scripts to a file in the repository (e.g. scripts/deploy.sh) and call it from the workflow

name: No Workflow Comments
description: The workflow has no comments explaining its purpose or non-obvious configuration choices.
fix: Add YAML comments (#) to explain the workflow purpose and any non-obvious decisions

name: Mixed Runner Types
description: Different jobs use different runner OS types without clear reason, making maintenance harder.
fix: Standardize runner types across jobs unless cross-platform testing is intentional
